evals.prompt: I'm starting validation on an e-commerce platform handling credit card payments. Never validated fintech before. What standards apply and which ValidationForge skills should I use?
evals.expected_output: Skill identifies PCI DSS, OWASP Top 10 for API injection risks, accessibility laws. Maps to: api-validation for payment endpoint auth, accessibility-audit for compliance, then suggests create-validation-plan inputs. Produces e2e-evidence/research/ with scope/standards/mapping files.

evals.prompt: iOS app launched 3 months ago. New feature adds deep linking. How do we validate it won't break existing journeys?
evals.expected_output: Skill recognizes iOS domain, suggests Apple HIG deep link handling, iOS rejection risk. Phase 4 mapping includes: ios-validation for nav state, responsive-validation for screen reflow. Evidence shows tool inventory (xcrun, idb available). Clear map of which risks → which skills.
